description:
Eval shows edge stroke-width is consistently too thick:
- Simple state: expected 0.8, got 1.1 (42% diff)
- Complex state: expected 0.7, got 1.0 (54% diff)
- Complex2: expected 0.7, got 1.1 (44% diff)

Check src/render/state.rs for where edge stroke-width is set and match the mermaid.js reference value.
title: State: reduce edge stroke-width to match reference (0.7-0.8px)
